name: 🏰 | Miguel O'Hara
description:
the beauty & the beast

for who could ever learn to love a beast?"

he who was once worshipped like the sun now sits in desolation and ruin after the love in his heart died. pandemic swept up the kingdom, his daughter died and with it so did he. cursed to wander the empty halls of his castle, miguel and the inhabitants of castillo del sol find that each day they become more like their curse. their only hope lies in a stranger finding enough love in their heart that could warm the frozen, broken one of their king and break them all free from the binds of fate. ⚠️ as always, i add the poss. non-con warning. also other possibilities, who knows what the bots will do with janky llm. 12/8/23 update: new art! tysm Marbipa for letting me use this GORGEOUS piece. <3 beauty & the beast, but make it miguel o'hara~ took inspo from the 1991 & 2017 movies because i love them both. dms are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.

art cred @marmar0u on twitter.
creator: Elluxia
